particulars.description: 2 £1 ordinary shares held in 27 hammersmith grove limited and all present and future certificated stocks, shares, loan capital, securities, bonds and investments (whether or not marketable) in 27 hammersmith grove limited (the "investments") including any dividend, interest or other distribution paid in respect of these investments and any right, money, shares or property accruing, offered or issued at in time in relation to any of the investments by way of redemption, substitution, exchange, conversion, bonus, preference or otherwise, under option rights or otherwise.
